name: Textarea
description: Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

api.name: Textarea
api.description: Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-textarea density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only padding / min-height shifts between values.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying <textarea> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because parse-time has already passed by the time the runtime adds the element to the DOM.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Textarea Value="@_text" OnInput="@(e => _text = e.Value?.ToString() ?? "")" placeholder="Write something..." />
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Character count: @_text.Length</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private string _text = "";
}

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<FormField Label="Your Bio" HelpText="You can use markdown for formatting.">
    <Textarea placeholder="Tell us a little bit about yourself." rows="4" />
</FormField>

mdSummary:
# Textarea

Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/textarea

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Textarea | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| Textarea | OnInput | `EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | AutoResize | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | MaxRows | `int` | `10` |  |
| Textarea | ShowCount | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | MaxLength | `int?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Resize | `TextareaResize` | `TextareaResize.Vertical` |  |
| Textarea | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Textarea | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-textarea density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only padding / min-height shifts between values. |
| Textarea | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | AutoFocus | `bool` | `` | Focuses the underlying <textarea> on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because parse-time has already passed by the time the runtime adds the element to the DOM. |
| Textarea | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Textarea | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `OnInput` (`EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Textarea />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
